meaning: n.瑜珈修行者,信奉瑜珈者,沉思默想者,神秘莫测的人
examples: Purity is an idea for the yogi or the monk.
"Come and sit down", said the yogi.
One day, a yogi and his disciple arrived to the big city.
Triyoga Chelsea, on the other hand, is a beautiful, clean and airy space opened by lawyer-turned-yogi Jonathan Sattin.
The band had gone to Bangor to study transcendental meditation with Maharishi Mahesh Yogi.
